concepts.name: Inflation
concepts.definition: General rise in prices reducing money's purchasing power.

concepts.name: Consumer Price Index (CPI)
concepts.definition: Measures price changes of a fixed basket of consumer goods.

concepts.name: GDP Deflator
concepts.definition: Measures price changes of all domestically produced goods and services.

concepts.name: Fixed Income
concepts.definition: Income that does not adjust with inflation, risking loss of real value.

concepts.name: Variable Income
concepts.definition: Income that may adjust with inflation, offering potential protection.

concepts.name: Household Budget Strategy
concepts.definition: Planning income and expenses to maintain financial stability.

concepts.name: Macroeconomic Policy
concepts.definition: Government and central bank actions influencing inflation.

processes.name: Evaluating Household Budget Strategy Under Inflation
steps: Seek income sources that keep pace with inflation
Maintain financial stability and purchasing power
